For the access files, Speech Volume Leveler was used to make speech more consistent and intelligible; noise (hiss/hum/etc.) in the audio was reduced using Noise Reduction process.

The source is a reel tape. The playback device was a TEAC A-3340S reel-to-reel tape deck playing at a speed of 7.5 ips. The audio was captured with Hammerfall DSP Multiface II A/D Converter hardware and Adobe Audition software. Editing and processing was also performed with Adobe Audition. For the access files, Normalize process was used to modify volume levels.

The source is a TDK S-1800 reel tape. The playback device was a TEAC A-3340S reel-to-reel tape deck playing at a speed of 7.5 ips. The audio was captured with Hammerfall DSP Multiface II A/D Converter hardware and Adobe Audition software. The audio is almost exclusively in the left channel. Editing and processing was also performed with Adobe Audition. For the access files, only the left channel was used; noise (hiss/hum/etc.) in the audio was reduced using Noise Reduction process; Speech Volume Leveler was used to make speech more consistent and intelligible.
